items.name: writing-intelligence
items.description: 52 files. 42,264 words. The most advanced writing compiler ever open-sourced. 6-pass pipeline. 14 genres. 8 voices. 100-point scoring. Free — because language is how the poor build power and the middle class get into the wealthy class. Sovereign writing infrastructure for everyone. Antonio T. Smith Jr. / Density6
